title: Mob Grow Up Tweaks
description: Customize how quickly mobs grow up
body:
Customize how quickly mobs grow up. You can change in ticks how fast villagers, wild and bred animals grow up. The default settings will increase the time those mobs stay in their baby form.

### Default Settings
- Villagers: 80 min
- Bred animals: 50 min
- Spawned animals (Wild): 30 min
